'''√d-r-m''' ('''darama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:largen|largen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:largen|largen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √d-r-m
|-
! Lemma
| darama
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || daramithi || daramiji || daramishi || darami
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || daramuthuth || daramujuj || daramushush || daram
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || daramuthu || daramuju || daramushu || daramu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || daramufuth || daramufuj || daramufush || daramuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || daramethe || darameje || darameshe || darame
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || daramothoth || daramojoj || daramoshosh || daram
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || daramotho || daramojo || daramosho || daramo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || daramofoth || daramofoj || daramofosh || daramof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || daramïf || daramïf || daramïf || daramïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || daramïfïf || daramïfïf || daramïfïf || daramïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || daramïf || daramïf || daramïf || daramïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || daramïf || daramïf || daramïf || daramïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || daramæthæ || daramæjæ || daramæshæ || daramæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || daramathath || daramajaj || daramashash || daram
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || daramatha || daramaja || daramasha || darama
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || daramafath || daramafaj || daramafash || daramaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || daramasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || godaramasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokidaramasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || daramnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || godaramnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokidaramnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || daramshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || godaramnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokidaramshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || daramroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || godaramnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokidaramroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || darammuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || godaramnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokidarammuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || daramsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || godaramnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokidaramsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || daramngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || godaramnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokidaramngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || daramyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || godaramnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokidaramyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || daramyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || godaramnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokidaramyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || daramnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || godaramnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokidaramnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || daramnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || godaramnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidaramnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || daramnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || godaramnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokidaramnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || daramshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || godaramnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokidaramshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || daramshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || godaramnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidaramshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || daramshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || godaramnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokidaramshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || daramronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || godaramnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokidaramronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || daramroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || godaramnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokidaramroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || daramromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || godaramnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokidaramromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || darammunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || godaramnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokidarammunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || darammushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || godaramnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokidarammushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || darammuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || godaramnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidarammuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || daram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || dæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hodaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hodæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohodaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohodæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüdaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüdæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïdaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïdæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || ludaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || ludæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luludaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luludæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lidaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lidæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilidaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilidæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kodaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kodæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokodaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokodæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kedaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kedæræm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekedaram
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekedæræm
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
